docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ JULIA E.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,983.23 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ JULIA E. HERNANDEZ MOISES E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ JULIA E. WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ JULIA E.
